tick_queue_approved.name: ip-cidr
tick_queue_approved.idea: IP/CIDR Calculator & Subnet Analyzer — network address, broadcast, mask, wildcard, host count, binary bitmask; Is-IP-in-range checker; subnet splitter; bulk comparison
tick_queue_approved.rationale: Cloud/backend/devops engineers deal with CIDR blocks every day. Pure 32-bit bitwise integer math in JS, zero deps.

tick_queue_approved.name: port-ref
tick_queue_approved.idea: Well-Known Port Quick-Reference — type a port or service name, get IANA service, protocol, privilege boundary warning (<1024), security flag; bulk annotation from docker-compose / k8s manifests
tick_queue_approved.rationale: DevOps engineers consult port numbers constantly. Pure JS static lookup, PWA, tight scope.

resume_instructions: IMPLEMENTATION gate escalation (attempt 2) on ip-cidr. LESSONS veto resolved (sticky first-col headers applied). Two remaining objections to fix before clearing escalation and resuming: (1) BUGS (high): in analyzeBulk, replace the two-variable containment check with a single range-overlap check: `var overlaps = (a.net32 <= b.broadcast32) && (b.net32 <= a.broadcast32);` and use `if (overlaps)` in place of `if (aContainsB || bContainsA)`. (2) SECURITY (high): CSP has `script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'` — replace 'unsafe-inline' with a SHA-256 hash of the inline <script> block. After building, compute the hash with: `openssl dgst -sha256 -binary < <(sed -n '/<script>/,/<\/script>/p' ip-cidr/index.html | grep -v '<script>' | grep -v '<\/script>') | base64` and embed it as `script-src 'sha256-<hash>'`. Once both fixes are applied, clear council_escalations, then re-run with attempt 1: `python3 council.py --gate implementation --project ip-cidr --goal "IP/CIDR Calculator & Subnet Analyzer — network address, broadcast, mask, wildcard, host count, binary bitmask; Is-IP-in-range checker; subnet splitter; bulk comparison" --context ip-cidr/index.html --attempt 1`

council_escalations.reason: Unresolved objections after 2 attempts: BUGS (overlap detection logic) and SECURITY (CSP unsafe-inline for script-src).
